data.name: Daily Waifu!
data.detailed_description:
Daily Waifu is a romantic adult visual novel where you spend points to unlock spicy stories featuring charming anime girls. Each scene is filled with playful dialogue, suggestive moments, and fully illustrated encounters.

With a clean and simple interface, you’ll enjoy a relaxed experience focused on storytelling and character interactions. There are no difficult choices, no time limits—just waifus, points, and pleasure.

Whether you're here for a quick daily dose of romance or want to unlock every scene, Daily Waifu offers a fun and naughty escape for visual novel lovers.
data.about_the_game:
Daily Waifu is a romantic adult visual novel where you spend points to unlock spicy stories featuring charming anime girls. Each scene is filled with playful dialogue, suggestive moments, and fully illustrated encounters.

With a clean and simple interface, you’ll enjoy a relaxed experience focused on storytelling and character interactions. There are no difficult choices, no time limits—just waifus, points, and pleasure.

Whether you're here for a quick daily dose of romance or want to unlock every scene, Daily Waifu offers a fun and naughty escape for visual novel lovers.
data.short_description: Daily Waifu is a lighthearted adult visual novel where you unlock sexy stories and flirt with cute waifus. Earn points, choose scenes, and enjoy fully illustrated spicy encounters!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with 1GB VRAM
